title: GenerationGrammarKeywords
description: The composition generation-grammar keyword vocabulary — the x-swc-* dialect a Composition Profile grammar carries. Each property is a keyword; a property schema may carry any subset of these.

x-dereference.description: Base-owned, unprefixed dispatch handle (like $ref): names the Dereferencer that resolves this node. Shared across engines; canonical home is the laravel-json-reference leaf.

x-swc-beat.description: How the interpreter treats the beat at the frontier: expandable → one focused expansion call realizes its children; writable → the model writes the leaf directly.

x-swc-cache.description: A caching policy for the beat generate/ground capability: `scope` (invocation → TTL-keyed; snapshot → frozen), optional `ttl`, and an optional grounding-key subset.

x-swc-generate.description: Generate this property when its beat is expanded: a handler name selects a registered generate capability, or `true` uses the profile default.

x-swc-ground.description: Fill this property from the Composition grounding snapshot: a source name selects a registered ground capability, or `true` uses the property name as the source.

x-swc-max-depth.description: Caps the recursion depth of grammar expansion at this subtree root; the interpreter clamps the effective depth to the engine cap and demotes an expandable beat at the ceiling. Read-side only — no attribute emits it.

x-swc-pause.description: Marks the beat a pause checkpoint (HITL): the interpreter yields its cell for review and does not expand its children until approved.

x-swc-polish.description: Whether the beat is eligible for auto-polish; `false` fences its cells out of the whole-composition polish orchestrator.

x-swc-prose.description: The prose disposition of a grounding field — how its facts may be discussed in body prose (subject → write freely; render-only → do not name; nameable → may be named).

x-swc-prose-note.description: An optional field-level prose instruction that accompanies the prose disposition.
